groups: workflow, roadmap and frontend source contracts

fullBackendSuite.reason: 15 drawing/export test modules require ezdxf, which is not installed in the packaging container. The project dependency manifest and startup checker include ezdxf; the user's target environment previously reported ezdxf 1.4.4 installed.

frontendProductionBuild.reason: node_modules is intentionally excluded from the source package and dependency installation was unavailable in the offline packaging container. Changed TypeScript/TSX sources passed transpile syntax checks.
